title: Fix gallery image display issue - dark blank spaces in all sections

requirements.text: Fix the Portfolio component image paths to correctly reference all 60 gallery images from the /assets/generated/ directory, ensuring residential-1.png through residential-20.png, commercial-1.png through commercial-20.png, and before-after-1.png through before-after-20.png are properly loaded

quotes: All sections. Dark Blank spaces. And after the recent changes
all three gallery sections (residential, commercial, and before/after) are showing dark blank spaces instead of images

acceptanceCriteria: All 20 residential project images display correctly in the residential gallery tab
All 20 commercial project images display correctly in the commercial gallery tab
All 20 before/after images display correctly in the before/after gallery tab
No dark blank spaces appear in any gallery section
Image paths use the correct /assets/generated/ directory structure

requirements.text: Add error handling and fallback behavior to the Portfolio component to display placeholder content or error messages when gallery images fail to load, and log image loading errors to the browser console for debugging

quotes: Adding error handling so we can see if images are failing to load

acceptanceCriteria: Browser console logs clear error messages when images fail to load
Failed images show a graceful fallback UI instead of blank spaces
Error messages indicate which specific image file failed to load

requirements.text: Verify and ensure all 60 gallery images (residential-1.png through residential-20.png, commercial-1.png through commercial-20.png, before-after-1.png through before-after-20.png) are properly rendered as static assets in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory with correct filenames and dimensions

quotes: Ensuring all 60 images are properly rendered as static assets

acceptanceCriteria: All 60 image files exist in frontend/public/assets/generated directory
Image filenames match the exact naming convention used in the Portfolio component
All images are accessible via browser when navigating directly to their URLs

constraints: Do not modify the useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui files
Maintain all existing Portfolio component functionality including the three-tab filtering system
Preserve all existing image descriptions and project information in the Portfolio component
nonGoals: Creating new gallery images or generating replacement images
Redesigning the Portfolio component layout or styling
Adding new gallery categories beyond residential, commercial, and before/after
Modifying the backend contact form functionality
